sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَرْحَمَ النَّاسِ بِالْخَلْقِ، وَتَجَلَّتْ هَذِهِ الرَّحْمَةُ فِي تَعَامُلِهِ مَعَ الصِّغَارِ وَالْكِبَارِ عَلَى حَدٍّ سَوَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, bio je najmilostiviji čovjek prema stvorenjima, a ta milost se očitovala u njegovom ophodnju s mlađima i starijima podjednako.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) was the most merciful of people toward creation, and this mercy was manifested in his dealings with the young and old alike.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ رَوَى أَنَسُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ قَائِلًا: «مَا رَأَيْتُ أَحَدًا كَانَ أَرْحَمَ بِالْعِيَالِ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْفَضَائِلِ، رَقْمُ ٢٣١٦].
sentences.translation: Enes ibn Malik, radijallahu anhu, prenosi: 'Nisam vidio nikoga ko je bio milostiviji prema porodici od Allahovog Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem' [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o odlikama, br. 2316].
sentences.translationEn: Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) narrated: 'I have never seen anyone who was more compassionate toward family than the Messenger of Allah (PBUH)' [Narrated by Muslim in the Book of Virtues, No. 2316].

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الرَّحْمَةُ لَمْ تَكُنْ مُجَرَّدَ عَاطِفَةٍ عَابِرَةٍ، بَلْ كَانَتْ مَنْهَجًا حَيَاتِيًّا يَدْعُو إِلَى التَّرَاحُمِ وَالتَّعَاطُفِ بَيْنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ova milost nije bila samo prolazna emocija, već životni program koji poziva na međusobnu samilost i saosjećanje među muslimanima.
sentences.translationEn: This mercy was not merely a passing emotion, but a way of life that calls for mutual compassion and empathy among Muslims.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاقْتِدَاءَ بِخُلُقِ النَّبِيِّ الْكَرِيمِ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى تَمَاسُكِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ وَانْتِشَارِ الْمَحَبَّةِ وَالسَّلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Slijeđenje plemenitog Poslanikovog morala vodi ka koheziji društva i širenju ljubavi i mira.
sentences.translationEn: Following the noble character of the Prophet leads to social cohesion and the spread of love and peace.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُؤْمِنُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ مَنْ يَتَمَثَّلُ هَذِهِ الْقِيَمَ فِي بَيْتِهِ وَمَعَ جِيرَانِهِ وَزُمَلَائِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi vjernik je onaj koji ove vrijednosti primjenjuje u svojoj kući, sa svojim komšijama i kolegama.
sentences.translationEn: A true believer is one who embodies these values in their home and with their neighbors and colleagues.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ، نَنَالُ رِضَا اللهِ سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَى وَمَحَبَّةَ النَّاسِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na taj način postižemo zadovoljstvo Uzvišenog Allaha i ljubav ljudi na ovom i onom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: By doing so, we attain the pleasure of Allah Almighty and the love of people in this world and the Hereafter.
